content: Please begin / continue a conversation topic (greetings are not needed). Ensure to change the topic if the current one is losing steam. The conversation should steer towards topics which reveal information about the characters and who they are, or instead drive forward previous conversations in their memory.

**Late visual context as seen by MJR (the player): The scene shows a starry night sky with a white, cloudy surface in the foreground, containing several objects. The surface is covered in white clouds that are more dense towards the right side of the scene. In the center of the scene, there is a collection of various black and white icons and symbols scattered across the surface. Some of these icons appear to be shields, swords, and other medieval-style emblems. In the bottom-left corner of the scene, there is a black box with a smaller inset screen displaying a zoomed-out version of the main view. This inset screen shows more of the surrounding area, including additional clouds and possibly more icons or objects in the distance. At the very bottom of the scene, there is a taskbar with various icons representing different programs or applications. These icons are likely related to the software or platform being used to display this scene. Overall, the scene presents a visually striking and intriguing environment, with its unique combination of celestial and terrestrial elements. The presence of the icons and symbols on the surface adds an air of mystery, suggesting that there may be more to the scene than initially meets the eye.**
Redoran Guard: Damn ash storms ragin' all night—feels like Red Mountain's breathin' down our necks at this hour.
